examples.title: Algorithm: Token Recognition
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating the token recognition process
examples.code:
ALGORITHM TokenRecognition
INPUT: character stream
OUTPUT: token stream

BEGIN
 WHILE not end of input stream DO
 read next character
 IF character matches a token pattern THEN
 add token to token stream
 ELSE
 report lexical error
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the token recognition algorithm

examples.title: Python: Token Recognition
examples.description: Python implementation demonstrating the token recognition process
examples.code:
import re

def token_recognition(input_stream):
 token_stream = []
 token_patterns = [
 (r'\d+', 'integer'),
 (r'[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*', 'identifier'),
 (r'==|!=|<|<=|>|>=', 'relational operator')
 ]

 for pattern, token_type in token_patterns:
 for match in re.finditer(pattern, input_stream):
 token_stream.append((match.group(), token_type))

 return token_stream

input_stream = 'sum=42+val;'
token_stream = token_recognition(input_stream)
print(token_stream)
